The Property

2,700 sq ft of
Mountain Luxury

A modern mountain retreat with epic Mt. Quandary views — your perfect escape for adventure and relaxation. This 2,700+ sq ft luxury A-frame sits in a quiet cul-de-sac off Highway 9, just 12 minutes from Main Street Breckenridge. Two king suites, a bunk room, secret loft, hot tub, fire pit deck, chef's kitchen, and more. Two families or a group — it's all here.

What Guests Love

Little Details That Matter

01
Perfect For Every Occasion

Romantic getaways, elopements, anniversaries, family retreats, ski trips, hiking adventures. Nature is at your doorstep — Quandary Peak trailhead is 2.6 miles away.

02
Stargazer's Paradise

Evenings on the deck: fire pit, s'mores, and a hot tub under a sky packed with stars.

03
Chef's Kitchen

Nespresso, Keurig, drip machine, French press, coffee grinder, wine fridge, air fryer, blender, KitchenAid range. Fully loaded.

04
Entertainment

Foosball, arcade, Xbox, board games, chess, checkers, record player, JBL Bluetooth speaker, life-size Connect Four, cornhole.

05
Mt. Quandary at Your Door

One of Colorado's most accessible 14ers is 2.6 miles away. Summit it in the morning, soak in the hot tub that evening. The views rival the summit itself.

06
Built for Year Round Remote Work

Dedicated workspace, fast WiFi, evaporative cooling for summer, in-floor radiant heating for winter. Do your best work — then go enjoy where you are.

What This Place Offers

Every detail considered. Scroll through for the full list of what's included.

🏔 Scenic Views
  • Mountain view (Mt. Quandary)
🛀 Bathroom
  • Bathtub
  • Hair dryer
  • Cleaning products
  • Public Goods shampoo, conditioner, body soap
  • Hot water
  • Shower gel
🛀 Bedroom & Laundry
  • Free washer & dryer (in unit)
  • Essentials: towels, sheets, soap, toilet paper
  • Hangers
  • Cotton bed linens
  • Extra pillows and blankets
  • Room-darkening shades
  • Iron & drying rack
  • Clothing storage: closet and dresser
🎬 Entertainment
  • TV
  • Record player
  • JBL Bluetooth sound system
  • Xbox One console
  • Yoga mat
  • Arcade games & foosball
  • Books and reading material
  • Themed rooms
  • Life-size games (Connect Four, Cornhole)
  • Telescope for stargazing
👦 Family
  • Children's books and toys (ages 2-5, 5-10, 10+)
  • Board games
🔥 Heating & Cooling
  • Indoor gas fireplace
  • Ceiling fan
  • Portable fans
  • Portable heater
  • Radiant heating
  • Evaporative cooling units (x3)
🛡 Home Safety
  • Exterior security cameras (entry points only, South-facing, never on hot tub or indoors)
  • Smoke alarm
  • Carbon monoxide alarm
  • Two fire extinguishers (garage & kitchen)
  • First aid kit
🖥 Internet & Office
  • Fast WiFi
  • Dedicated workspace
🍽 Kitchen & Dining
  • Full chef's kitchen
  • KitchenAid refrigerator
  • KitchenAid oven & electric stove
  • Microwave
  • Dishwasher
  • Mini fridge & freezer
  • Cooking basics: pots, pans, oil, salt, pepper
  • Full dishes, silverware, bowls, plates, cups
  • Hot water kettle
  • Coffee: Nespresso, Keurig, drip, French press, pour-over
✈ Standout Features
  • Hot tub (always 104°)
  • Propane fire pit deck
  • Two coffee bars + tea
  • Wine fridge
  • Air fryer & blender
  • Secret loft for yoga/meditation
  • 2-car heated garage
  • 8-chair deck

Better Price.

Booking directly with us means lower rates, direct access to your host, and a more personal experience — guests typically save $200–$400 on a standard stay.

Best Rate Guaranteed

Booking directly with us means no platform markups. Same property, same host — just a better price than you'll find anywhere else.

Location

Find Your Way Here

Quiet cul-de-sac off Highway 9, Blue River — 12 minutes south of Main Street Breckenridge.

Find Us
Breckenridge, CO, United States

The home is a quick 12 min drive North (6.9 miles) to Main Street Breckenridge. Winter traffic may alter the time to get to Main Street and the gondola.

Nearby Points of Interest
  • Isak the Troll6.9 miles
  • Peak 97.5 miles
  • Peak 8 / Breck Connect Gondola7.8 miles to parking
  • McCullough Gulch Trailhead4 miles
  • Breckenridge Recreation Center8.5 miles
  • Frisco Adventure Park15.3 miles
❄ Winter Advisory · Nov – May

This neighborhood requires 4WD or AWD with snow tires or M+S tires (min 3/16" tread), functioning defrosts, ice scraper, snow brush, and windshield fluid rated to 0°F. Bring a shovel, gloves, boots, and warm clothing.

The Quandary neighborhood has contracted snowplow service on the gravel road. The driveway is cleared after every 4" of accumulation.

Before You Book

Good to Know

🔒
Access & Check-In

Digital keypad entry on the front door or garage. Your unique access code arrives 30–60 minutes before your 4:00 PM check-in.

📝
Rental Agreement

A Breckhaus Aframe rental agreement with house rules is sent upon booking and must be signed before your stay. $1,000 refundable security deposit.

✈
Travel Insurance

Strongly recommended — especially for winter travel. We can't cover canceled flights or weather delays, but insurance can.

📷
Commercial Shoots

Elopements, engagement sessions, and brand photography welcome — but must be pre-approved and contracted separately. Message us on social for details.

📍
Distance & Location

12 min to Breckenridge Ski Resort & Main Street. 2.6 miles to Quandary Peak trailhead. ~2 hours from Denver International Airport.

📄
License & Compliance

STR License #STR22-N2-00176. Max occupancy: 8 guests. Parking: 2 in garage, 2 outside. Fully licensed short-term rental in Summit County.
